BackstoryDef.title: gun kid
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up around firearms and was taught to strip, clean, and fire before learning much else. The adults around [PAWN_objective] considered this practical.

BackstoryDef.title: watch child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Observation posts are quiet for long stretches and then suddenly not. [PAWN_nameDef] spent childhood learning the difference, sitting at a watch position while others worked or slept. [PAWN_pronoun] became good at reading the quality of silence before it changed.

BackstoryDef.title: vermin hunter
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was paid in scraps to control pest populations in storage areas and maintenance corridors. The work was unglamorous and [PAWN_pronoun] was thorough about it, developing patience and a precise understanding of animal behavior that most formal education never covered.

BackstoryDef.title: range hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: A shooting range needed an extra pair of hands and [PAWN_nameDef] was there every day, first as a nuisance and eventually as the best shot on the premises. The owner eventually stopped charging [PAWN_objective] range fees in exchange for keeping the targets in order.

BackstoryDef.title: trap setter
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] set and checked traps from an early age, learning to read animal behavior and terrain and developing the patience that effective trapping requires. [PAWN_pronoun] became very good at knowing where an animal would be rather than where it had been.

BackstoryDef.title: patrol runner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Messages had to move along patrol routes and someone small and quick was useful for the job. [PAWN_nameDef] was both, and picked up weapon handling along the way as a professional courtesy to the people [PAWN_pronoun] ran for. [PAWN_pronoun] was never officially assigned to a post.

BackstoryDef.title: scrap shooter
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] built a functioning weapon from salvaged parts at age nine. It worked well enough to cause concern. [PAWN_pronoun] kept building better ones, each iteration improving on the last and raising the level of concern proportionally.

BackstoryDef.title: brawler kid
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The fights found [PAWN_nameDef] before [PAWN_pronoun] found them. [PAWN_pronoun] lost most of the early ones and learned from the losses in a way [PAWN_pronoun] couldn't have managed any other way.

BackstoryDef.title: drill child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was enrolled in a physical discipline program before [PAWN_pronoun] was old enough to object. The program was rigorous, repetitive, and effective. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled despite having had no say in the matter, which [PAWN_pronoun] regarded as the most interesting part.

BackstoryDef.title: dock runner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in cargo handling environments where quick feet and spatial awareness mattered more than size. [PAWN_pronoun] was small, learned that fast mattered more than large, and developed an instinct for reading how people moved through crowded spaces before they knew where they were going.

BackstoryDef.title: street child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Without much supervision, [PAWN_nameDef] learned the informal rules of unsupervised spaces from the people who enforced them. The most important lesson was how to read a situation before it became a confrontation, which was more useful and less painful than learning afterward.

BackstoryDef.title: hauler child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Heavy loads move on small backs when no one larger is available. [PAWN_nameDef] was available from an early age and was expected to carry [PAWN_possessive] share without complaint.

BackstoryDef.title: sparring child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] spent most of childhood in a training facility running repetitive drills under instruction. The work was precise, demanding, and offered no reward beyond getting better at it. [PAWN_pronoun] got better at it. That turned out to be enough.

BackstoryDef.title: fighting child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Unofficial youth competitions paid in pride and occasionally food. [PAWN_nameDef] entered them, won enough to make it a habit, and kept winning until [PAWN_pronoun] was old enough to stop needing the prize. [PAWN_pronoun] kept competing anyway, out of habit.

BackstoryDef.title: forge hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] handed tools before [PAWN_pronoun] could name them and learned the names soon enough. The work in a forge is hot, loud, and physical, and [PAWN_pronoun] was comfortable with all three before most children had decided what they wanted to do with their lives.

BackstoryDef.title: inspection runner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] followed inspection rounds from age six, carrying equipment and recording readings while learning what was supposed to work and what to do when it didn't. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a habit of noticing things that didn't quite match what they should have looked like.

BackstoryDef.title: repair child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] fixed things from an early age -- small things, then larger things, then things [PAWN_pronoun] wasn't supposed to touch. The last category was usually improved rather than damaged, which was how [PAWN_pronoun] kept getting access to the next category.

BackstoryDef.title: weld hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: A parent's trade required hot work and steady hands. [PAWN_nameDef] was taught the basics early and expected to develop the rest through practice.

BackstoryDef.title: shelter builder
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] helped construct temporary housing during a difficult period, working alongside adults who didn't have time to explain everything and learning by watching what they didn't explain. [PAWN_pronoun] retained a preference for building with clear purpose over building with careful planning.

BackstoryDef.title: sealant hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] learned to seal pressure-critical joins before learning most other construction skills. The sequence was intentional. In an enclosed environment, a leak is not an inconvenience -- it is a problem that gets worse while you are learning to address it.

BackstoryDef.title: framework hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] helped erect structural frameworks in an expanding settlement, working alongside adults who treated the child's contribution as real rather than symbolic. [PAWN_pronoun] developed an intuitive sense for load and stress that no amount of later instruction would have replaced.

BackstoryDef.title: mine child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up below ground. [PAWN_pronoun] knows the smell of fresh rock, the sound a wall makes before it shifts, and the particular way light behaves in passages that most people never enter.

BackstoryDef.title: ore hauler
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] pulled ore carts before [PAWN_pronoun] was in double digits, working shifts that were long relative to [PAWN_possessive] size and physical demands that didn't scale down to account for it. [PAWN_pronoun] still has the shoulders.

BackstoryDef.title: deep worker
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Below-ground settlements impose their own conditions on the people raised in them -- low light, recycled air, the constant sound of mechanical systems. [PAWN_nameDef] learned those conditions early and never fully readjusted to anything above. [PAWN_pronoun] doesn't mind.

BackstoryDef.title: rock sorter
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] sorted ore by hand for years, developing a detailed knowledge of mineral composition through direct contact and an indifference to repetitive work that most people find impossible to sustain. The knowledge transferred.

BackstoryDef.title: seam crawler
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Small enough to fit where adults couldn't, [PAWN_nameDef] was sent into narrow seams to assess and extract, learning to read rock formation in real time and to make decisions about when to proceed and when to stop under conditions that didn't allow for long deliberation.

BackstoryDef.title: drill hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] operated support equipment on a drilling crew from the age of eleven. [PAWN_pronoun] was competent enough that no one asked inconvenient questions about [PAWN_possessive] age.

BackstoryDef.title: shaft crawler
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The ventilation shafts needed cleaning and [PAWN_nameDef] was the right size. [PAWN_pronoun] spent years moving through the infrastructure of an enclosed settlement from the inside, developing a thorough knowledge of how the systems connected and where the problems accumulated.

BackstoryDef.title: kitchen child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up underfoot in a working kitchen, absorbing the rhythm of the place before [PAWN_pronoun] could reach the countertop and becoming useful before anyone formally taught [PAWN_objective] how. [PAWN_pronoun] learned by proximity and by repetition and by being in the way in the right places.

BackstoryDef.title: ration runner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] helped distribute and stretch limited food supplies during a lean period, learning to do a great deal with very little and to make allocation decisions that had real consequences for real people. [PAWN_pronoun] learned early that fairness and sufficiency are not the same problem.

BackstoryDef.title: galley child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] worked a communal galley from age nine. The work was hot, repetitive, and performed for people who mostly didn't notice it was being done. [PAWN_pronoun] did it anyway, every shift, and developed a cook's patience and a cook's particular relationship with ingratitude.

BackstoryDef.title: forager child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for supplementing the family diet with whatever could be found or grown, developing a practical botanical knowledge that was broader than most formal education covered and more immediately useful than any of it.

BackstoryDef.title: preservation child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] helped preserve and store food through difficult seasons, learning the methods that extended shelf life and the judgment required to decide when something was still worth keeping and when the honest answer was that it wasn't.

BackstoryDef.title: mess hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] served meals in a communal eating area for most of childhood, moving between tables and absorbing more about the people [PAWN_pronoun] served than they ever realized. Mess workers are invisible in a particular way that teaches you a great deal about how people behave when unobserved.

BackstoryDef.title: brew hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Fermentation is a slow process that requires attention at specific moments and patience at all the others. [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a fermentation operation, learned both, and developed an understanding of the process that went well past what the work required.

BackstoryDef.title: bay tender
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up tending plants in an enclosed growing facility, learning light cycles, nutrient ratios, and the specific warning signs that plants show when something is wrong before anything visible happens on the surface. [PAWN_pronoun] noticed things early and learned to trust that noticing.

BackstoryDef.title: seed keeper
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] helped maintain a seed archive from an early age, handling material that needed to remain viable and learning the protocols that kept it that way over years of careful storage. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a precise relationship with record-keeping that extended to everything else.

BackstoryDef.title: harvest hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] worked harvest shifts before and after school until there was no time for school. [PAWN_pronoun] stopped missing it around the same time [PAWN_pronoun] stopped expecting it. The work made [PAWN_objective] useful in a way that school had not yet managed to.

BackstoryDef.title: farm kid
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up on a working farm and absorbed its rhythms so thoroughly that [PAWN_pronoun] can read a plant's condition at a glance. [PAWN_pronoun] has opinions about soil that [PAWN_pronoun] will share at length if given the opportunity, and sometimes without it.

BackstoryDef.title: graft hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] helped graft and cultivate plant specimens in a specialist facility, developing the gentle precision required for work where errors couldn't be corrected and material couldn't be replaced. [PAWN_pronoun] has handled things carefully by instinct ever since.

BackstoryDef.title: nursery hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] tended seedlings in a propagation nursery for most of childhood, handling material at its most fragile stage and learning the sustained attention that stage required. [PAWN_pronoun] has low tolerance for neglect -- of plants and of most other things.

BackstoryDef.title: herb gatherer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up learning plant-based remedies from someone who knew them well, absorbing a practical botanical pharmacology that formal medicine rarely covered in comparable depth and that [PAWN_pronoun] never lost even when [PAWN_pronoun] stopped needing to use it regularly.

BackstoryDef.title: stable hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] cared for animals in a communal stable from an early age, learning their moods and requirements and developing the patience that animal work requires as a professional necessity rather than a personality trait. [PAWN_pronoun] found [PAWN_possessive] patience worked on people too, though less reliably.

BackstoryDef.title: feral child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] spent a significant portion of childhood effectively unsupervised in an environment with free-roaming animals. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to exist in that environment on its own terms -- what to approach, what to avoid, and what the difference between the two actually looked like.

BackstoryDef.title: herd hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] helped manage a small herd from an early age, developing the patience that animal management requires and a specific stubbornness about doing it correctly that [PAWN_pronoun] brought to most subsequent work without being entirely aware of it.

BackstoryDef.title: pest handler
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] managed animal populations in an enclosed environment, working against the problems that unchecked pests created in close quarters. [PAWN_pronoun] became methodical, learned the patterns that made control possible, and never developed any particular feeling about the animals involved.

BackstoryDef.title: animal keeper
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up around working animals and learned their habits before learning to read people, finding the animals more consistent and the consistency more comfortable. [PAWN_pronoun] understood this preference well enough by adulthood to know that it wasn't going to change.

BackstoryDef.title: beast keeper
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for a guard animal from age eight, managing a creature that had been trained for purposes more serious than companionship. [PAWN_pronoun] took the work seriously enough that the animal did too. They reached an understanding that didn't require language.

BackstoryDef.title: breeding hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up around a breeding program and absorbed more about genetics, temperament, and long-term animal management than most formal programs provided. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to think about what an animal would become rather than what it currently was.

BackstoryDef.title: tinker child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] took things apart and put them back together from an early age, not always in the right order but eventually, and always with the genuine intention of understanding what made them work. [PAWN_pronoun] got faster and more accurate over time, though the intention never changed.

BackstoryDef.title: bellows hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] worked at a smithing operation from age eight, first pumping bellows, then sweeping, then watching, then eventually doing. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the work in the order the work was willing to reveal itself, which was the only order that actually worked.

BackstoryDef.title: woodwork child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Carpentry workshops teach clean habits and produce strong opinions about finish quality. [PAWN_nameDef] absorbed both over years of childhood work in one. [PAWN_pronoun] still notices finish quality in things that have nothing to do with wood, which is either a skill or an inconvenience.

BackstoryDef.title: salvage child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up salvaging useful components from discarded equipment, learning to assess what was recoverable and what wasn't and to find the value that others had decided wasn't worth their time. [PAWN_pronoun] developed an eye for potential that extended beyond salvage.

BackstoryDef.title: shop hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a repair shop where everything arrived broken and left fixed. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to tell the difference between the two, then to understand why the difference existed, and eventually to produce the second from the first without being told how.

BackstoryDef.title: electrical hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] followed an electrician on jobs from an early age, learning by proximity what the work required and absorbing the safety habits by observing what happened on the occasions they weren't followed. [PAWN_pronoun] has not been seriously hurt yet.

BackstoryDef.title: textile hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Cloth came in, finished goods went out. [PAWN_nameDef] was there for both ends of the process from an early age, learning the material through handling and the production through repetition until both became instinct.

BackstoryDef.title: art student
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was enrolled in formal art instruction early and turned out to be genuinely talented, which surprised [PAWN_objective] at least as much as it surprised everyone else. [PAWN_pronoun] worked hard at something [PAWN_pronoun] was already good at, which is rarer than it sounds.

BackstoryDef.title: theatre child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in and around a theatre company, absorbing craft, performance technique, and the particular skill of reading a room before the room knew it was being read. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that what an audience believes is happening is more important than what is actually happening.

BackstoryDef.title: drawing child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] drew constantly -- on walls, on scraps, on anything available. The adults around [PAWN_objective] were divided on whether this constituted talent or vandalism. [PAWN_pronoun] kept drawing regardless and got considerably better, which eventually settled the argument.

BackstoryDef.title: musical child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was trained in a musical tradition from an early age, learning discipline through repetition and expression through everything that came after enough repetition had made the mechanics invisible. [PAWN_pronoun] still practices, even when there is no one to perform for.

BackstoryDef.title: studio hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Clay and stone were the first materials [PAWN_nameDef] learned to work. [PAWN_pronoun] grew up in a sculptor's studio, developing spatial reasoning and the kind of hands that come from handling weight all day, every day.

BackstoryDef.title: story writer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] spent childhood writing stories that no one read. [PAWN_pronoun] kept writing them regardless, getting considerably better with each iteration and gradually less concerned with whether anyone would.

BackstoryDef.title: dancing child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was trained as a dancer from an early age, learning discipline, precise body awareness, and the physical intelligence the form requires alongside the specific and underrated knowledge of how to fall without injuring yourself.

BackstoryDef.title: clinic child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in or around a medical facility, absorbing clinical habits through proximity before formal instruction began. [PAWN_pronoun] arrived at medical knowledge from the practice end rather than the theory end, which produced a different kind of understanding.

BackstoryDef.title: first aider
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was trained in emergency response at a young age, learning to assess and act in situations where the useful window was short. [PAWN_pronoun] is calm in those moments in a way that took practice to develop and that most people assume is natural.

BackstoryDef.title: pharmacy hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a pharmacy, sorting and labeling compounds from an early age and learning through proximity and instruction what each one did, what happened in combination, and what the consequences of a dosing error looked like. [PAWN_pronoun] has been precise about measurements ever since.

BackstoryDef.title: steady hands
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in an environment where precision was a household value and imprecision was noted. [PAWN_pronoun] developed unusually steady hands as a consequence -- and only later understood that this was the environment producing a specific result rather than an innate quality.

BackstoryDef.title: caregiver
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] helped care for an ill family member through much of childhood, learning practical medicine out of necessity and developing a patience with suffering that formal training rarely produces in the same form. [PAWN_pronoun] knows the difference between treating and waiting.

BackstoryDef.title: ward runner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] spent childhood in clinical settings, watching a parent work and absorbing what [PAWN_pronoun] saw before [PAWN_pronoun] was formally taught any of it. [PAWN_pronoun] arrived at [PAWN_possessive] first formal medical instruction having already understood most of it by observation.

BackstoryDef.title: self-taught medic
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] learned medicine from texts, trial, and a community with too few alternatives. Most patients recovered. [PAWN_pronoun] learned from the ones who didn't, which is the harder part of self-directed medical education and the part that no text covers adequately.

BackstoryDef.title: trade runner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up negotiating on behalf of a family trade, learning that confidence can be manufactured and that this is not the same as dishonesty. [PAWN_pronoun] developed the ability to enter a negotiation with less information than the other party and leave with an acceptable outcome.

BackstoryDef.title: performer child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up performing in front of audiences, learning to read a crowd, adjust tone and pace in real time, and recover from failure in front of people without letting them see the recovery happening. [PAWN_pronoun] became good at all three and better at the last one than [PAWN_pronoun] would have preferred.

BackstoryDef.title: community child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Social cohesion was a daily practice in the settlement [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in -- not assumed but actively maintained. [PAWN_pronoun] absorbed it early and was good at it before [PAWN_pronoun] could articulate what [PAWN_pronoun] was doing.

BackstoryDef.title: inn hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: A public house is never quiet and rarely simple. [PAWN_nameDef] grew up managing both, learning to handle a wide range of people and longer hours than most children kept, and developing an early fluency in what people wanted and why they were frequently wrong about it.

BackstoryDef.title: message runner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ran messages between communities from the age of eight, learning to navigate unfamiliar spaces quickly, read rooms briefly, and extract useful information from short interactions. [PAWN_pronoun] was trusted with more sensitive material as [PAWN_pronoun] got older.

BackstoryDef.title: market hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] worked a market stall from an early age, learning to sell almost anything and to know exactly what it was worth -- and that knowing both was not the same skill and required being developed separately, because conflating them was how you stopped being profitable.

BackstoryDef.title: advocate child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up watching a parent argue for a community's interests in rooms where those interests were not the first priority. [PAWN_pronoun] absorbed the method and the motivation and the specific patience required to keep both intact when the room pushed back.

BackstoryDef.title: bookworm
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] read everything available. When [PAWN_pronoun] ran out of books, [PAWN_pronoun] reread them. [PAWN_pronoun] was not popular at school and didn't have the social experience to understand precisely why, which made [PAWN_pronoun] read more and understand it eventually.

BackstoryDef.title: lab runner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Research facilities need people to move things, fetch things, and stay out of the way. [PAWN_nameDef] did all three and absorbed methodology along the way by asking more questions than most researchers found comfortable. [PAWN_pronoun] was tolerated because [PAWN_pronoun] was useful.

BackstoryDef.title: workshop hand
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Half-finished projects covered every surface of the workshop [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to evaluate which ones were worth finishing and what distinguished a promising idea from an abandoned one, which turned out to be a skill that transferred well beyond the workshop.

BackstoryDef.title: school child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was effectively raised in a school, absorbing the curriculum through multiple repetitions and developing strong opinions about pedagogy that [PAWN_pronoun] has since shared with people who didn't ask, in contexts where they didn't expect it.

BackstoryDef.title: stargazer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] spent childhood cataloguing the sky, learning to identify bodies and calculate positions with the patience that sustained observation requires and the precision that it eventually produces. [PAWN_pronoun] can find north without instruments.

BackstoryDef.title: navigator child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] learned navigation and calculation from a very early age, developing the spatial reasoning and dead-reckoning ability that the work required alongside a deep discomfort with being uncertain about where [PAWN_pronoun] was. [PAWN_pronoun] is rarely uncertain.

BackstoryDef.title: clockwork child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was fascinated with mechanisms from an early age, spending childhood taking them apart to understand how they worked and usually managing to reassemble them in working order afterward. The failures were instructive. [PAWN_pronoun] kept notes on those.

BackstoryDef.title: colony born
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a recently established settlement where everyone worked and no one was exempted on account of being young. [PAWN_pronoun] was useful from an early age because the settlement needed [PAWN_objective] to be, and developed the generalist competence that followed from being needed in multiple ways.

BackstoryDef.title: orphaned child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up without parents in a communal care setting, learning to be useful early and to rely on [PAWN_objective]self in ways that most children with stable support structures never had to develop. [PAWN_pronoun] is competent at an unusual range of things and rarely asks for help with any of them.

BackstoryDef.title: eldest child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was the eldest of several children and spent most of childhood managing the others -- organizing, mediating, patching injuries, and making decisions that were technically not [PAWN_possessive] to make but that no one else was going to make. [PAWN_pronoun] is organized, patient, and tired.

BackstoryDef.title: travelling child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] never stayed anywhere long enough to attend the same school twice. [PAWN_pronoun] learned what could be picked up quickly, which skills transferred between communities, and which social approaches opened doors in unfamiliar places. [PAWN_pronoun] is comfortable being new.

BackstoryDef.title: childhood survivor
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] survived a significant disaster during childhood, learning in compressed time what people actually needed when infrastructure failed and how to provide some of it with whatever was at hand. [PAWN_pronoun] remembers what the process of figuring that out felt like.

BackstoryDef.title: trade apprentice
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was apprenticed to a craftsperson before most children were reading, learning to do before learning to understand and developing the embodied knowledge that comes from years of physical practice with someone who knew the work well enough to correct the small errors before they became habits.

BackstoryDef.title: cave child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Below-ground settlements impose their own conditions on the people raised in them -- recycled air, low light, the constant sound of the systems keeping everything functional. [PAWN_nameDef] learned those conditions early and never fully readjusted to anything above.

BackstoryDef.title: foundry child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Industrial casting facilities run hot and never stop. [PAWN_nameDef] grew up around one, learning what molten material does to things, how to move through that environment without incident, and a thorough respect for the heat that [PAWN_pronoun] has maintained in contexts that didn't require it.

BackstoryDef.title: scholar child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: High expectations were the baseline in [PAWN_nameDef]'s household. Curiosity was required. Ignorance was not tolerated. [PAWN_pronoun] met both standards from an early age and developed opinions about both that [PAWN_pronoun] has shared widely ever since, to mixed reception.

BackstoryDef.title: greenhouse child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Controlled growing environments are privileges, and [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in one and taught to treat it accordingly. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the systems that sustained it and the consequences when they weren't maintained, which gave [PAWN_objective] a healthy relationship with things that required constant attention.

BackstoryDef.title: cartographer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up with maps on every wall and a parent who could read all of them and explain what they meant. [PAWN_pronoun] can do the same. [PAWN_pronoun] finds it difficult to be in a space without knowing how it connects to the spaces around it.

BackstoryDef.title: guard child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up inside a security culture, watching professionals manage access, assess threats, and position themselves in spaces they were responsible for. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to read environments for vulnerability before [PAWN_pronoun] was old enough to act on what [PAWN_pronoun] saw.

BackstoryDef.title: war refugee
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] learned to shoot during a period of civil unrest when a parent decided that the knowledge was more important than the question of whether [PAWN_pronoun] was old enough for it. [PAWN_pronoun] never forgot the lesson or the circumstances that made it necessary.

BackstoryDef.title: linguist
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Multiple languages were spoken in [PAWN_nameDef]'s household as a matter of daily necessity, and [PAWN_pronoun] learned early that how something was said shaped what it meant as much as the words themselves did. [PAWN_pronoun] notices the gap between the two in conversations that other people don't notice it in.
